title: lycopus riparius
intro: Lycopus riparius, also known as water bugle or water leaved bugle, is a perennial aquatic plant that belongs to the mint family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and relieving respiratory problems. Lycopus riparius can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in salves and ointments for topical application.
